Prompt.title: Prompt
Prompt.description: An AI image prompt item in the gallery

prompt.description: The exact textual AI prompt used to generate the image

imageUrl.description: The public download URL of the generated image

imagePath.description: The path to the image stored in Cloud Storage (for deletion)

createdAt.description: The server-side timestamp when this was uploaded

createdBy.description: User ID of the admin who uploaded it
